Carousel
RESEARCH REPORT
The Data Behind Emotional Architecture

We analyzed 10,000 carousels across 500 brands. The patterns are unmistakable.

SLIDEFORGE EVIDENCE ARGUMENT
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

Engagement by Slide Position

Slide 1-3 92
Slide 4-6 71
Slide 7-9 58
Slide 10+ 34
SLIDEFORGE EVIDENCE ARGUMENT
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign
💡
💡
info

Key Finding

Carousels with strong emotional hooks in slides 1-3 retain 2.7x more viewers through the full sequence. The first three slides determine whether anyone sees slide 10.

SLIDEFORGE EVIDENCE ARGUMENT
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

Emotional Arc vs Flat Structure

Flat (no arc) 31
Light arc 54
Strong arc 87
Full persuasion 94
SLIDEFORGE EVIDENCE ARGUMENT
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign
💡
💡
info

The Arc Premium

Carousels designed with deliberate emotional progression outperform flat content by 3x. The difference isn't design quality — it's narrative structure.

SLIDEFORGE EVIDENCE ARGUMENT
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

Visual Rhythm Impact

Same bg all slides 28
Random variation 45
DLD rhythm 73
SLIDEFORGE EVIDENCE ARGUMENT
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign
💡
💡
info

Dark-Light-Dark Works

Alternating dark and light backgrounds creates visual rhythm that sustains attention. Monotone carousels lose 62% of viewers by slide 5.

SLIDEFORGE EVIDENCE ARGUMENT
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

Evidence Stacking Effect

Claim only 22
Claim + 1 proof 48
Claim + 3 proofs 76
Claim + social proof 91
SLIDEFORGE EVIDENCE ARGUMENT
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign
💡
💡
info

Stack Trust, Don't Scatter It

Each additional proof point compounds credibility. But mixing proof types (data + testimonial + visual) is 40% more effective than repeating the same type.

SLIDEFORGE EVIDENCE ARGUMENT
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

Apply This to Your Content

01
Audit
Score your existing carousels against these benchmarks
02
Prioritize
Fix the first 3 slides first — they determine everything
03
Rhythm
Add dark-light alternation to every sequence
04
Measure
Track completion rate, not just impressions

Automated 3-step compilation pipeline converting raw JSON specifications into production-ready carousel assets.
